Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4365 "RESCUESQUAD-4365" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rescue Squad.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
NOP'd out the calls to the kernal load routine ($FFD5) at $47C5 and $47E2, plus the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $4A93 to remove disk access from the game.
Note: to dump the game, just load it and enter the monitor when the title screen is displayed. This ensures the final data is loaded from disk before dumping.
